title: cyclosorus asperus
intro: Cyclosorus asperus, also known as the spiny cyclosorus or rough-leaved spleenwort, is a type of fern plant belonging to the family Blechnaceae. Traditionally, Cyclosorus asperus has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Cyclosorus asperus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal purposes.
